# ▶️ How to Run
# pip install -r requirements.txt
# uvicorn app.main:app --reload

# Open:
# 👉 http://127.0.0.1:8000/docs
#  (Swagger UI auto-generated)

SpringBoot to Python conversion each layer microservice.
Spring Boot->	FastAPI
Application.java->	main.py
Controller->	user_controller.py
Service->	user_service.py
Repository->	user_repository.py
Entity->	user_model.py
DTO->	user_schema.py
Config->	core/config.py
Exception Handler->	global_exception.py


Tech stack used in this python microservice rest endpoints using FastAPI
1. Implemented basic auth/jwt auth security.
2. Implemented validation as well.
3. Implemented Retry with fallback if call external API and print its response
4. Impelemented Rate limiting.
5.  Implemented  Circuit breaker.
6. Implemented Exception handling using global exception handler.
7. Implemneted DB crud operarations.
8. Implemented Logging
9. Caching: In memory implemented only for GetUser, put/update:todo
